历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 36873 → 38584 → 40124 → 49791 → 56852, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 20000 places; the 2025 baseline is about 56852, with an accelerating backward trend in the last 3 years.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category plan was 66 in 2021 → 64 in 2022 → 71 in 2023 → 78 in 2024 → 84 in 2025, expanding year by year; the 2026 plan is 96, an increase of 12 from 2025 (expansion of about 14.3%), with a relatively large expansion rate, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, with continuous improvement in ranking, and the school's comprehensive strength and recognition have increased year by year.
4. [Reputation and Popularity] The school has no significant public opinion records in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as "average", with comprehensive popularity of about 290,000, short video exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious signs of rising application attention; no history of filing gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation; the school has Korean, Clinical Medicine, Law, etc. as characteristic majors, but the discipline evaluation grade has not reached A level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 365,000 (estimated based on historical ratio), slightly increased from 363,000 in 2025; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen for 5 consecutive years: 412 in 2021 → 430 in 2022 → 439 in 2023 → 448 in 2024 → 459 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Hebei Province, with average regional preference; the school's enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a relatively high proportion (84 in Physics Category in 2025), but it is not a provincial university, and cross-provincial application popularity is limited by regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (14.3%), a slight increase in the number of provincial candidates, and the continuous rise of the provincial control line, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 56852; the predicted minimum ranking is about 61775, with a range of 61275–62275.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州。作为综合类公办本科院校，其医学类专业在区域内具有一定影响力，211头衔对省 内外考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续高热，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤其受追捧。延边大学地处东北边疆地区，地理位置相对偏远，但211身份和医学类专业的稳定就业前景仍吸引大 量河北考生报考。河北省医学类招生规模较大，考生对省外211医学院校的报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年延边大学医学类最低录取位次约为61289名（波动区间60799-61779名）。扩招3人使位次数字有所增大（更难进），但新增口腔 医学专业可能推高整体报考热度，位次较2025年继续小幅下降，符合近年持续走高的竞争趋势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University's medical programs in Hebei Province have been continuously declining over the past five years: 31,356 in 2021 → 38,584 in 2022 → 39,366 in 2023 → 45,895 in 2024 → 56,852 in 2025, with an average annual decrease of about 5,000-10,000 places, indicating a year-on-year increase in application popularity and intensifying competition. The enrollment plan has also been expanding simultaneously: 18 in 2021 → 21 in 2022 → 21 in 2023 → 24 in 2024 → 26 in 2025 → 29 in 2026, with six consecutive years of expansion. In 2026, there is an increase of 3 students (+11.5%), and a new major in Stomatology (planned 3 students) has been added, bringing the total medical program plan to 29 students. The expansion is relatively large, but the addition of a popular new major may attract more high-scoring applicants, with both supply and demand showing growth trends.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university, located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. As a comprehensive public undergraduate institution, its medical programs have a certain influence in the region, and the 211 title still holds strong appeal for candidates both inside and outside the province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to be highly popular nationwide, with specialties such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being particularly sought after. Yanbian University is located in the northeastern border region, with a relatively remote geographical location, but its 211 status and the stable employment prospects of medical majors still attract a large number of Hebei candidates. Hebei Province has a relatively large enrollment scale for medical programs, and candidates have a strong willingness to apply for 211 medical schools outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical programs in 2026 is approximately 61,289 (fluctuation range 60,799-61,779). The expansion of 3 students causes the ranking number to increase (harder to enter), but the addition of the new Stomatology major may boost overall application popularity, with the ranking continuing to decline slightly compared to 2025, consistent with the recent trend of intensifying competition.
